once on Base (Ethereum L2). Cannot be modified post-deployment.         Twenty-three artifact types in eight logical groups:         CONTENT (0-11):    CODE, RESEARCH, DATA, MODEL, AGENT, MEDIA, TEXT, POST, ONCHAIN, REPORT, NOTE, WEBSITE         LIFECYCLE (12):    EVENT         TRANSACTION (13):  RECEIPT         GATED (14-16):     LEGAL, ENTITY, PROOF         SELF-SERVICE (17): RETRACTION         REVIEW (18-20):    REVIEW, VOID, AFFIRMED         BILLING (21):      ACCOUNT         CATCH-ALL (22):    OTHER         Three register entry points:         registerContent(arId, base, extra)   \u2014 types 0-13, 21, 22 (onlyOperator)         registerGated(arId, base, extra)     \u2014 types 14-16 (onlyLegal/Entity/ProofOperator)         registerTargeted(arId, base, targetArId, extra) \u2014 types 17-20 (onlyOperator)","kind":"dev","methods":{"registerContent(string,(uint8,string,string,string,string,string,string),bytes)":{"params":{"arId":"Unique AR-ID for this anchor.","base":"AnchorBase with artifactType, manifestHash, parentArId, etc.","extra":"ABI-encoded type-specific fields (e.g. abi.encode(gitHash, license, language, version, url) for params.base: AnchorBase with artifactType, manifestHash, parentArId, etc.
params.extra: ABI-encoded type-specific fields (e.g. abi.encode(gitHash, license, language, version, url) for CODE).

params.base: AnchorBase with artifactType set to LEGAL, ENTITY, or PROOF.
AnchorBase with artifactType set to RETRACTION, REVIEW, VOID, or AFFIRMED.

registerContent(string,(uint8,string,str.notice: Register any content, lifecycle, transaction, billing, or catch-all anchor.

registerGated(string,(uint8,string,strin.notice: Register a gated anchor (LEGAL, ENTITY, or PROOF).

registerTargeted(string,(uint8,string,st.notice: Register a targeted anchor (RETRACTION, REVIEW, VOID, or AFFIRMED).
